Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input Two parts describing a loan application process Part 1 Strict Normative Constraints Sequence and Part 2 Desiderata Soft Recommendations Plus a tabular Event Log with 3 cases Output Requirements 1 Identify normative rule violations which cases and why 2 Identify desiderata failures which cases noting they arent severe just suboptimal 3 Suggest interpretations justifications for the observed behaviors Tone Style Objective analytical structured

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze Part 1 Normative Rules Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Ordering Rules Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision Approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case Rejected do NOT finalize documentation before closing Not Allowed Skipping changing order finalizing after rejection closing without following decision logic

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze Part 2 Desiderata Soft Rules Credit Check within 24 hours of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision Follow up Call before Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Events App Rec 0900 Credit Check 0930 Risk Assessment 1000 Loan Decision Approved 1100 Inform Applicant 1300 Finalize Doc 1330 Close Case 1400 All on 2024 01 10 Normative Check Perfect sequence Approved path followed correctly Finalize before Close Desiderata Check Credit Check within 24h Yes 30 mins Inform within 48h of Decision Yes 2 hours Follow up Call No not in the log Result No normative violations One desideratum failure missing follow up call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Events App Rec 0800 Risk Assessment 0820 Credit Check 0900 Loan Decision Rejected 0930 Finalize Doc 1000 Close Case 1030 All on 2024 01 11 Normative Check Risk Assessment 0820 happened before Credit Check 0900 VIOLATION Ordering rule CC must occur before RA Loan Decision is Rejected 0930 but Finalize Documentation 1000 occurred VIOLATION Rule If rejected do not finalize documentation

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Desiderata Check Credit Check within 24h Yes 1 hour Inform within 48h of Decision Inform Applicant is missing from the log entirely Wait is Inform Applicant a strict rule or desideratum Looking at Part 1 Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision under Ordering Rules And under Sequence Loan Decision Inform Applicant The log doesnt show Inform Applicant for Case 2 This is a Normative Violation Skipping a required activity in the sequence Self correction I must include this

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Result Multiple normative violations ordering rejected logic skipping mandatory step Desiderata failure missing follow up call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Events App Rec Jan 12 0900 Credit Check Jan 14 1000 Risk Assessment Jan 14 1100 Loan Decision Approved Jan 14 1200 Inform Applicant Jan 16 1500 Finalize Doc Jan 17 0900 Close Case Jan 17 1000 No Follow up Call Normative Check Sequence is App CC RA LD IA FD CC Approved path followed perfectly Desiderata Check Credit Check within 24h App at Jan 12 0900 CC at Jan 14 1000 Thats 49 hours VIOLATION Desideratum Inform within 48h of Decision Decision Jan 14 1200 Inform Jan 16 1500 Thats 51 hours VIOLATION Desideratum Follow up Call No VIOLATION Desideratum Result No normative violations Multiple desideratum failures timing delays missing call

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Draft the Response Structure Introduction Brief summary of the evaluation 1 Normative Rule Violations Breakdown by Case Clearly state the rule broken and the evidence from the log 2 Desiderata Failures Breakdown by Case Emphasize these are suboptimal but not severe 3 Interpretations and Justifications Provide plausible real world reasons for why these deviations might have occurred eg system glitches manual overrides backlog differing priorities

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 The messy one Why do RA before CC Maybe an automated trigger fired prematurely or an experienced underwriter skipped ahead based on preliminary knowledge but logged it wrong Why finalize after rejection Possibly a systemic error where the documentation system wasnt notified of the rejection flag or a manual data entry mistake Why skip informing Oversight due to the chaotic handling of the case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 The slow one Why the delays Weekend effect Jan 12 is a Friday Jan 14 is a Sunday Check calendar for 2024 Jan 12 is Friday Jan 13 is Sat Jan 14 is Sun Ah weekend operations This is a perfect justification for the 24h and 48h delays Follow up call skipped likely to just get the delayed case closed quickly

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Review against Constraints Did I answer all 3 parts of the prompt Yes Are the normative vs desiderata distinctions clear Yes Is the tone appropriate Yes
